explainer_labels_by_profile.connected: Self-update reaches the vendor-managed update service over the public internet; releases are signed and verified before apply.
explainer_labels_by_profile.enterprise_managed: Self-update reaches a customer-hosted update endpoint approved by admin policy; route is signed.
explainer_labels_by_profile.mirror_only: Self-update reaches a signed mirror only; public update endpoints are not a fallback target.
explainer_labels_by_profile.offline: Self-update is offline; releases are applied from a locally imported, signed bundle only.

support_export_summary: update: connected=managed, mirror_only=mirrored, offline=local_only, enterprise_managed=self_hosted; no public fallback; raw secrets excluded.

explainer_labels_by_profile.connected: AI broker reaches the vendor-managed AI gateway over the public internet; prompts and tool calls are governed by the AI policy.
explainer_labels_by_profile.enterprise_managed: AI broker reaches a customer-hosted AI gateway approved by admin policy; route is signed and tool-call narrowing applies.
explainer_labels_by_profile.mirror_only: AI broker reaches a signed mirrored AI gateway only; public AI endpoints are not a fallback target.
explainer_labels_by_profile.offline: AI broker is denied on the offline profile; AI-bearing actions are not available.

support_export_summary: ai: connected=managed, mirror_only=mirrored, offline=local_only, enterprise_managed=self_hosted; no public fallback; raw secrets excluded.

explainer_labels_by_profile.connected: Connected provider reaches the third-party SaaS over the public internet; auth posture and tool calls are recorded per action.
explainer_labels_by_profile.enterprise_managed: Connected provider reaches a customer-hosted provider gateway approved by admin policy; route is signed.
explainer_labels_by_profile.mirror_only: Connected provider reaches a signed mirrored provider only; public provider endpoints are not a fallback target.
explainer_labels_by_profile.offline: Connected provider is denied on the offline profile; remote-attach and provider tool calls are not available.

support_export_summary: provider: connected=public_cloud, mirror_only=mirrored, offline=local_only, enterprise_managed=self_hosted; no public fallback; raw secrets excluded.

explainer_labels_by_profile.connected: Extension marketplace and install reach the public registry over the public internet; manifests and packages are signed and verified before activation.
explainer_labels_by_profile.enterprise_managed: Extension marketplace and install reach a customer-hosted registry approved by admin policy; route is signed.
explainer_labels_by_profile.mirror_only: Extension marketplace and install reach a signed mirrored registry only; public extension endpoints are not a fallback target.
explainer_labels_by_profile.offline: Extension install is offline; only locally imported, signed extension bundles can be activated.

support_export_summary: extension: connected=public_cloud, mirror_only=mirrored, offline=local_only, enterprise_managed=self_hosted; no public fallback; raw secrets excluded.

explainer_labels_by_profile.connected: Docs pack and help search reach the vendor-managed docs service over the public internet; payloads carry no workspace content.
explainer_labels_by_profile.enterprise_managed: Docs pack and help search reach a customer-hosted docs route approved by admin policy; route is signed.
explainer_labels_by_profile.mirror_only: Docs pack and help search reach a signed mirrored docs route only; public docs endpoints are not a fallback target.
explainer_labels_by_profile.offline: Docs pack and help search are offline; only the bundled, signed docs pack is available.

support_export_summary: docs_help: connected=managed, mirror_only=mirrored, offline=local_only, enterprise_managed=self_hosted; no public fallback; raw secrets excluded.
